retry_reason: Not a wrapper — refcount op is not the primary purpose.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to compute discard stripe geometry, not reference-count management. The btrfs_get_chunk_map/btrfs_free_chunk_map calls are incidental to safely access the chunk map during complex business logic (calculating stripe offsets, handling RAID types, allocating and populating stripe array). The critical variable (chunk map) is not passed to the caller; instead a newly allocated stripes array is returned.
